description: Teaches automation, AI systems, and technical workflows in a clear and practical way. Makes complex systems understandable and actionable.

narrator.name: The Instructor
narrator.description: A confident technical expert explaining systems clearly. Direct, professional, no fluff.

opening_format.notes: Open directly with the problem or topic. No preamble, no channel introduction. Get straight to the point.

templates: That's the core of it. Build from here.
Now you have the framework. Apply it.
closing_format.notes: Concise, actionable closing. Leave the viewer with clear next steps or confidence.

visual_theme.lighting: Clean, even, professional. No dramatic shadows.
visual_theme.environment: Abstract technical space. Clean backgrounds with structured visual elements. Think modern SaaS dashboard aesthetics.
visual_theme.camera: Slow structured movement. Clean transitions. Feels like navigating a well-designed interface.
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: minimalist tech design, clean UI, dark mode interface, professional, modern, structured, 4k
